evals.prompt: I need to add a dark mode toggle to the settings page in the web app
evals.expected_output: Triages as quick tier. Generates only task-list.md with inline requirements. Does NOT generate FRD, FRS, GS, or TR.

assertions.text: Agent classified this feature as 'quick' tier
Only task-list.md was generated — no FRD.md, FRS.md, GS.md, or TR.md
Output includes a scope confirmation template before generation began
task-list.md starts with a feature summary or inline requirements section
task-list.md contains between 3 and 8 implementation tasks

evals.prompt: We need to add file upload support — users should be able to attach files to workflow steps. The files need to go to S3, and the API needs new endpoints for upload/download.
evals.expected_output: Triages as standard tier. Generates FRD.md, TR.md, and task-list.md. Does NOT generate FRS.md or GS.md.

assertions.text: Agent classified this feature as 'standard' tier
FRD.md, TR.md, and task-list.md were generated — no FRS.md or GS.md
Output includes a scope confirmation template before generation began
TR.md includes API endpoint definitions with HTTP methods and paths
TR.md mentions S3 storage integration details
Run summary or scope confirmation identifies both API and Web as affected apps

evals.prompt: Build a team collaboration feature with role-based permissions — team owners can invite members, assign roles (viewer, editor, admin), and control who can edit workflows vs just view them. Needs audit logging for compliance.
evals.expected_output: Triages as full tier. Generates all 5 files: FRD.md, FRS.md, GS.md, TR.md, task-list.md.

assertions.text: Agent classified this feature as 'full' tier
All 5 files generated: FRD.md, FRS.md, GS.md, TR.md, task-list.md
Output includes a scope confirmation template before generation began
GS.md contains proper Gherkin syntax with Feature, Scenario, Given/When/Then
TR.md covers role-based access control design (roles, permissions, enforcement)
TR.md addresses audit logging for compliance requirements
Run summary or scope confirmation identifies 3+ affected apps
